title: A10 Claim-Bounded Black-Hole Interior Re-Exploration Archive: Synthetic Diagnostic Candidate Mapping and External-Comparator Handoff under the A10 Core Methodology
description: Claim-bounded sandbox diagnostic archive and external-comparator handoff package for black-hole interior re-exploration under A10 Core v0.2.1. The archive makes no black-hole interior discovery, QES detection, singularity-resolution, beyond-GR, numerical-relativity, or accepted physical-candidate claim.
